title: Cuneiform Tablet #0644: Achaemenid Royal Inscription
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Achaemenid period — a royal inscription document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Achaemenid period — a royal inscription document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Achaemenid period. Royal Inscription document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records royal inscription matters typical of Achaemenid period administrative or literary practice.
